subcodes.first_line: O ye two revered persons, ye servants in the vineyard of God! Verily, I read your letter and was informed of its contents filled with spiritual attractions
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها الشخصان المحترمان الخادمان فی کرم الله انی قرئت کتابکما و اطلعت بالمضمون
subcodes.subjects: @suffering; rejection of Christ, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
